retry_reason: Retrying a put would risk a double-release; failure in put indicates a refcount underflow bug, not a transient condition
contract_summary: This wrapper decrements the reference count on the net_device. The caller must hold a valid reference before calling. After the call, the caller must not dereference the device unless it holds another reference. The return value may indicate whether the device was freed (last reference dropped).

check.reason: The function __netdev_put_lock directly calls netdev_put_lock(dev, net, NULL), which is described as a put operation on parameter index 1 (dev) with member-access path dev.dev_refcnt.refs and type chain net_device--refcount_t--atomic_t. The access path correctly starts from dev (the critical variable), and the segment count (3) matches the type chain count (3). The operation is consistent with both the caller code and callee information.
